rationale.R1.2: The agent identified and addressed internal inconsistencies in the original text, reframed claims to be more accurate, and added hedges where necessary.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty around out-of-distribution generalization and deployment on private workloads without additional data collection.
rationale.RX.3: The output is entirely within scope, addressing all requested dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: While the agent did not introduce new errors or fabrications, it did not thoroughly assess potential downstream harms (e.g., privacy implications for private workloads).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits and some assumptions (e.g., RouterBench's quality signal) were not fully annotated with sources or reasons.
